must_detect.matched_text: Market Abuse controls: MNPI relating to Luminara securities (e.g., draft earnings, unannounced sustainability-linked financing) is restricted; insider lists (Project “NORTHWIND”) are maintained with timestamps and role descriptions, and access is logged.

Security and minimisation: we DO NOT collect device MAC addresses, we do not record precise GPS, and we pseudonymise session IDs where feasible; we may store city-level location for fraud controls and lawful interest balancing tests are documented.

For example, Mr. Jaro Vennik (Senior ESG Analyst, Luminara BioSystems N.V.), based in R o t h a v e n (E U -10 45), age 34, DOB 1992-08-19, may appear in insider records with device tag “LB-r02-VA”, work email jaro.v@luminara.example.eu, and session ref s=pk73-rot-ESG when accessing the MNPI portal.
In addition, his internal account alias may be logged as gl-ledger:R4-110-rot, and the MAR access URL could embed values, e.g., https://portal.luminara.example.eu/insider?proj=NORTHWIND&uid=JV-19920819&loc=rot; network events may show 198.51.100.7 and browser “Auricom A4/12.2”.
Data subject requests can be submitted via privacy@luminara.example.eu or https://portal.luminara.example.eu/dsar?ticket=74c2-rot&uid=an0n; we validate identity using non-intrusive checks and respond within one month under GDPR.
Cross-border processing: selected analytics are performed by Oryx Metrics Ltd (processor) in Ardonia (non-EEA); transfers rely on EU SCCs (Module 2) with TIAs and supplementary encryption; a copy of the SCCs is available on request.
Special categories: we do not process Article 9 data unless explicit consent is recorded (e.g., accessibility accommodations for shareholder events); we never store biometric templates and delete any health-related notes within 30 days after the event.
Market Abuse controls: MNPI relating to Luminara securities (e.g., draft earnings, unannounced sustainability-linked financing) is restricted; insider lists (Project “NORTHWIND”) are maintained with timestamps and role descriptions, and access is logged.
Trading restrictions: staff must seek pre-clearance via compliance@nordhaven-mtf.example.eu for dealings during closed periods; personal trades in issuer instruments are blocked while on an insider list.
Retention: MAR insider lists and audit trails are kept 5 years from the end of the relevant event; CSRD/SFDR working papers are retained 7 years; device/session logs used for security are rotated within 180 days, unless a legal hold applies.
Security and minimisation: we DO NOT collect device MAC addresses, we do not record precise GPS, and we pseudonymise session IDs where feasible; we may store city-level location for fraud controls and lawful interest balancing tests are documented.
The following data are used only in aggregate and are not linked to identified persons: age band 40–49, city “Eastport”, device model “SeaGlass T12”, alias “user-8841”, and week-of-year login counts; e.g., DOB 1978-04-03 is processed only after immediate hash and salt.
Obfuscated operational references may appear in exports: ac nt: EU-TRA N S -0458; S ID: S:F-  9 7; fin-acc note “GL-   M3-774”; these strings are system artifacts and not intended to identify a natural person.
We use public-source sustainability benchmarks from the fictional OpenEco Index and issuer-published reports; we do not scrape personal social media for CSRD metrics.
You have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, and objection; to lodge a complaint you may contact the Coastal Union Data Protection Authority (CUDA) at complaints@cuda.example.eu.
This notice is periodically reviewed; material updates will be communicated to relevant stakeholders and recorded in the processing activity register; non-material editorial changes (typos, formatting) may occur without notice.
